items.title: Python
items.description: Python is a high-level, general-purpose programming language that emphasizes code readability, simplicity, and ease-of-writing with the use of significant indentation, "plain English" naming, an extensive standard library, and garbage collection.

items.title: Rust
items.description: Rust is a general-purpose programming language which emphasizes performance, type safety, concurrency, and memory safety.

items.title: TypeScript
items.description: TypeScript is a high-level programming language that adds static typing with optional type annotations to JavaScript.

items.title: C++
items.description: C++ is a high-level, general-purpose programming language created by Danish computer scientist Bjarne Stroustrup.

items.title: Bash
items.description: Bash is an interactive command interpreter and command language developed for Unix-like operating systems.

items.title: Go
items.description: Go is a high-level, general-purpose programming language that is statically typed and compiled.
